privileged_info_summary: The task uses real EEG data from PhysioNet's publicly available EEG Motor Movement/Imagery Dataset (eegmmidb 1.0.0), specifically Subject S001 Run 04 (motor imagery recording). The data has been converted from EDF format (original 160 Hz, 64 channels) to OpenBCI-compatible CSV format (250 Hz sampling rate, 8 selected channels: Fp1, Fp2, C3, C4, P7, P8, O1, O2). The recording file 'OpenBCI-EEG-S001-MotorImagery.txt' contains 30,000 rows of data spanning 120 seconds with non-zero EEG values across all channels. All metadata specifications are accurate: target protocol is UDP, target format is JSON, port is 12345, and minimum required packets is 5.
